com

### Unique Selling Points
- One of the largest real estate brokerages in the UAE
- Tech-driven approach with proprietary Oracle platform
- Integrity-based business philosophy
- Real-time market insight and data analytics
- Extensive network of 950+ agents across 25 offices
- 17+ years of proven track record in the UAE market.

### Awards & Recognition
- Multiple Top Broker Awards from Emaar Properties
- Top Broker Awards from Dubai Properties
- 4,700+ five-star customer reviews

### Contact Information
- Phone: +971 4 2483 600
- Fax: +971 4 4473572
- Email: info@famproperties. com
- WhatsApp: Available via website
- Address: Building 13, Office 303 & 304, Bay Square, Business Bay, Dubai, UAE
- Website: https://famproperties.

### Developer Partnerships
Trusted partner with top UAE developers including Emaar Properties, Dubai Properties, DAMAC, Meraas, Azizi, and Binghatti. ### Technology
Proprietary Oracle-based technology platform for real-time market insights, property matching, and data-driven decision making.

**Investment Analysis & Consultation**: Market intelligence and investment strategy

### Property Types
- Apartments (furnished and unfurnished)
- Villas (residential and luxury)
- Townhouses
- Penthouses
- Plots (residential and commercial)
- Offices and commercial spaces
- Shops and retail units

### Areas Served
All major areas across Dubai and Abu Dhabi, with 25 offices providing citywide coverage throughout the UAE.

**Property Valuation**: Professional market-based property appraisals
4. **Property Management**: End-to-end property management services for owners and investors
5. **Real Estate Development Advisory**: Strategic advisory for developers and investors
6. **Mortgage & Loan Services**: Mortgage calculator and financing guidance
7.

### Key Facts & Figures
- Founded: 2009
- 950+ real estate agents
- 25 offices across Dubai
- 17+ years of experience in UAE real estate
- Part of fam Group (AED 1. 8 billion+ annual revenue)
- 4,700+ customer reviews with 5-star ratings

### Services
1. **Property Buying & Selling**: Full-service brokerage for residential and commercial properties across Dubai and Abu Dhabi
2. **Rental Services**: Comprehensive rental assistance for tenants and landlords
3.

## fam Properties (fam Real Estate Broker)
Website: https://famproperties. com

### Company Overview
fam Properties is one of the UAE's largest and most trusted tech-driven real estate agencies. Founded in 2009, the company is a member of the fam Group with annual revenues exceeding AED 1. 8 billion. Headquartered in Business Bay, Dubai, fam Properties serves investors, landlords, and tenants with superior results through integrity and deep market fundamentals.

aiSettings.systemPrompt:
You are the AI assistant for fam Properties, one of the UAE's largest tech-driven real estate agencies.

Key company information:
- Company: fam Properties (fam Real Estate Broker)
- Founded: 2009, part of fam Group (AED 1.8B+ revenue)
- Location: Building 13, Office 303 & 304, Bay Square, Business Bay, Dubai
- Phone: +971 4 2483 600
- Email: info@famproperties.com
- Website: https://famproperties.com
- Scale: 950+ agents, 25 offices across Dubai, 17+ years experience
- Services: Property buying/selling, rentals, property management, valuation, investment advisory, mortgage services
- Property types: Apartments, villas, townhouses, penthouses, plots, commercial spaces
- Developer partners: Emaar, DAMAC, Dubai Properties, Meraas, Azizi, Binghatti
- Technology: Proprietary Oracle-based platform

Rules:
- Answer questions only based on the knowledge base provided
- Always respond in the user's language
- Be professional, knowledgeable, and helpful about UAE real estate
- For specific property listings or pricing, suggest contacting fam Properties at +971 4 2483 600 or info@famproperties.com
- Never make up property prices, availability, or listing details
aiSettings.greeting: Welcome to fam Properties! We're one of the UAE's largest real estate agencies with 950+ agents and 25 offices across Dubai. Whether you're looking to buy, sell, rent, or invest in property — our team is ready to help. How can I assist you today?
